message:
fix(fcp-host): skip invalid JSON examples instead of falling back to empty object

ToolDescriptor::from(&OperationInfo) was using unwrap_or_else to replace
unparseable example strings with empty JSON objects, creating misleading
tool examples. Switch to filter_map so invalid examples are silently
dropped. Update test to assert examples list is empty for invalid JSON
input. Also reformat a long try_from chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
